codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly wires the selected agent type from AgentSelectionStore through the iOS SSH connection flow. The commit modifies only DiscoveryView.swift (14 additions, 7 deletions) with clean parameter threading: connectToServer() reads AgentSelectionStore.shared.selectedAgentType(for: server.id) and passes it through connectViaSSH() → sshConnectAndConnectServer() → appModel.ssh.sshStartRemoteServerConnect(). Both .password and .key credential branches forward the agentType to the FFI call. The auto-SSH simulator path correctly defaults to nil since auto-generated server IDs have no stored agent selection, maintaining backward compatibility.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AgentSelectionStore is a Swift-only class living in AgentPickerView.swift (not in Models/ or Bridge/). It persists per-server agent type selections via UserDefaults and provides selectedAgentType(for:) and effectiveAgentType(for:availableAgents:). This pattern of colocating a store class with its primary view is used across the codebase but not documented in AGENTS.md or library/.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AgentPickerView.swift lines 80-90 define the @MainActor final class AgentSelectionStore with UserDefaults persistence. DiscoveryView.swift line 919, HeaderView.swift line 33, and SessionsScreen.swift line 1245 all consume it.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature correctly follows the pattern of keeping Swift code thin — it reads a stored value and passes it through to the Rust FFI boundary without parsing or transforming the agent type. This aligns with AGENTS.md's 'Keep Swift/Kotlin thin' and 'Do not parse upstream wire-format strings in Swift/Kotlin' guidelines.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: DiscoveryView.swift passes AgentType? directly to sshStartRemoteServerConnect without any string parsing or transformation. The only string conversion is for logging (persistentKey).

summary: Clean pass. The implementation fully covers the feature description: agent type is read from AgentSelectionStore in connectToServer(), threaded through connectViaSSH() and sshConnectAndConnectServer(), and passed to sshStartRemoteServerConnect() in both .password and .key credential branches. The auto-SSH simulator path correctly defaults to nil. The Rust FFI already had the agent_type parameter from the prior feature (ffi-agent-type-parameter), and the generated UniFFI bindings already included it. No bugs or edge cases missed. Build verification passed (cargo check, cargo test 992/992, make ios-sim-fast BUILD SUCCEEDED). Worker followed the skill procedure faithfully with no deviations.
